quote: Ontologix brought structure to a reporting environment that had become impossible to trust. The team focused on business definitions first, then engineered the platform around them.
author: Anika Rao

quote: Their data engineering work gave our operations team a shared view of production performance. The dashboards are calm, fast, and far easier to act on than our previous reports.
author: Vikram Mehta

quote: The AI readiness assessment was refreshingly practical. Ontologix helped us understand which use cases were worth building and what data work had to happen first.
author: Priya Nair
